channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-2446] Update Whamcloud copyright messages to Intel for master branch
item.description: In LU-1839 the copyright messages were changed in the b2_3 branch, but apparently this was never done for the master branch. We need to run the build/updatecw.sh script on the master branch
item.summary: Update Whamcloud copyright messages to Intel for master branch

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: I would say before - our intention with any release candidate should be that it could be released as-is.

I agree with this. A carefully timed update at the end will work great. This this large update done the final update should be easier to review and land.

Do we want to land a final copyright patch after RC1 or before RC1 for 2.4?
Note that we'll have to re-run the script to update copyright messages for 2013 before the 2.4 release is made, but that can wait until we are closer to the release in March or so.
All patches have landed in Master and Copyrights are current for Master.

Another full round of patches has been submitted. A third patch for manual updates has been included: http://review.whamcloud.com/4948

All the above No Copyright issues have been dealt with appropriately.

http://review.whamcloud.com/4812 Initial Bulk Change.

Note: These changes are all Txt changes in the comment section, conflicts should be low. If it has problems landing it can be broken up.

At this time the following files report that they have no copyright:

libcfs/include/libcfs/libcfs_crypto.h: ** NO COPYRIGHT **
libcfs/include/libcfs/linux/linux-crypto.h: ** NO COPYRIGHT **
libcfs/include/libcfs/list.h: ** NO COPYRIGHT **
libcfs/include/libcfs/posix/posix-crypto.h: ** NO COPYRIGHT **
libcfs/include/libcfs/user-crypto.h: ** NO COPYRIGHT **
libcfs/include/libcfs/user-mem.h: ** NO COPYRIGHT **
libcfs/libcfs/linux/linux-crypto-adler.c: ** NO COPYRIGHT **
libcfs/libcfs/linux/linux-crypto-crc32.c: ** NO COPYRIGHT **
libcfs/libcfs/linux/linux-crypto.c: ** NO COPYRIGHT **
libcfs/libcfs/posix/posix-adler.c: ** NO COPYRIGHT **
libcfs/libcfs/posix/posix-crc32.c: ** NO COPYRIGHT **
libcfs/libcfs/posix/rbtree.c: ** NO COPYRIGHT **
libcfs/libcfs/user-crypto.c: ** NO COPYRIGHT **
lustre/contrib/packet-lustre.c: ** NO COPYRIGHT **
lustre/include/lustre/liblustreapi.h: ** NO COPYRIGHT **
lustre/liblustre/llite_cl.c: ** NO COPYRIGHT **
lustre/tests/fsx.c: ** NO COPYRIGHT **
lustre/utils/gss/context_lucid.c: ** NO COPYRIGHT **

Some of these files have "Other" valid copyrights, some are without the GPL or any copyright and some have valid Whamcloud/Intel commits that we can Intel Copyright against.

As we are working in Master it seems to be a good time to deal with these corner cases.
http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,4811 Is for the script itself. This is a direct port from the b2_3 work.

The 2.3 changes were never cherry picked into Master.

As I did this for the 2.3 release I will do it for Master.
